---
# Exhibit-only render. Includes the attachment cover sheet plus the
# text-messages exhibit page(s) so the exhibit reads as a self-
# contained packet (cover + records).
#
# Render with:  quarto render exhibit-only.qmd

format: warrant-vignette-typst
document-types:
  - attachment
  - exhibit

# ---- Jurisdiction & personnel (kept for header consistency
#      even though attachment cover doesn't display them) ----
state: Westbridge
county: Hartwell County
city: Northfield
detective-name: Detective J. Hayes

case-number: CR24-087

# ---- Exhibit content (the substance of this render) ----
exhibit-description: |
  Attached is an extract of the text-message thread between
  [Suspect A] and [Suspect B] dated 04-20-24 concerning the
  purchase and use of [redacted].

# Switch from meta-records (Facebook) to text-messages (SMS).
# `text-messages` and `sms` are accepted as aliases.
exhibit-type: text-messages
exhibit-title: TEXT MESSAGE EXTRACT
exhibit-device: "Samsung Galaxy A10e — Serial #RF8N41QDFOE"

# Each record needs: sender, timestamp, direction (out / in), body.
# The renderer tints outbound messages with a different label color
# so the conversation reads like a transcript.
exhibit-records:
  - {sender: "[Suspect A]", direction: out, timestamp: "2024-04-20 16:47:34", body: "Hey we can get the show on the road the stuff came in"}
  - {sender: "[Suspect B]", direction: in,  timestamp: "2024-04-20 16:47:37", body: "Bet"}
  - {sender: "[Suspect A]", direction: out, timestamp: "2024-04-20 16:48:02", body: "It came 2day"}
  - {sender: "[Suspect B]", direction: in,  timestamp: "2024-04-20 16:48:36", body: "Just the one or both"}
  - {sender: "[Suspect A]", direction: out, timestamp: "2024-04-20 16:49:14", body: "Both"}
  - {sender: "[Suspect A]", direction: out, timestamp: "2024-04-20 16:49:27", body: "What I ordered last month"}
  - {sender: "[Suspect B]", direction: in,  timestamp: "2024-04-20 16:50:06", body: "Are we starting it today"}
  - {sender: "[Suspect A]", direction: out, timestamp: "2024-04-20 16:50:30", body: "We can if u want the one will stop the hormones"}
---
